about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Pioneers of Digital Transformation in Sudan
about.description: Digital Automation is a Sudanese company specializing in Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Business Automation. Our headquarters is in Kassala State, Al-Daraja district, serving clients across Sudan and the Arab region.
about.missionText: Empowering Sudanese companies and institutions to leverage the latest AI and automation technologies for sustainable growth and high competitiveness.

why.subtitle: We combine technical expertise with local market understanding
why.local.title: Local Expertise
why.local.desc: We understand the needs of the Sudanese and Arab market and provide solutions suitable for the local environment
why.quality.title: High Quality
why.quality.desc: We are committed to the highest quality standards in every project we execute
why.support.title: Continuous Support
why.support.desc: We provide ongoing technical support and periodic maintenance for all our projects
why.fast.title: Fast Delivery
why.fast.desc: We meet deadlines and deliver our projects on time
